panels.title: Job Success Log Table
panels.description: Completed job events from all processors

panels.title: Job Failure Log Table
panels.description: Failed job events from all processors

targets.expr: {service="multilingual-tales-api", level="error"} | json | message=~".*(Job failed|FAILED|failed after).*" | line_format "{{.message}}"
{service="multilingual-tales-api"} | json | context="RequestLogService" | message=~".*\"event\":\"http_request\".*" | line_format "{{.message}}" | json | status=~"2..|3.."
{service="multilingual-tales-api"} | json | context="RequestLogService" | message=~".*\"event\":\"http_request\".*" | line_format "{{.message}}" | json | status=~"4..|5.."
